title: Unbounded _windows dict in ReplayProtector enables memory exhaustion
description:
File: python/src/lichen/link/replay.py:139, 151-152

The _windows dict in ReplayProtector grows without bound:

    self._windows: dict[bytes | str | int, ReplayWindow] = {}
    ...
    window = ReplayWindow(self._window_size)
    self._windows[sender] = window

Each new sender gets a ReplayWindow entry. An attacker sending frames with unique sender IDs could exhaust memory.

Combined with the MIC stub accepting all frames, this is exploitable.

Fix: Add an LRU eviction policy or cap the number of tracked senders. Old/inactive senders should be evicted.
close_reason: LRU eviction with OrderedDict(max_peers=32) already implemented and verified; updated notes with current HEAD. Tests and linters pass.
